patch.value:
## Problem
pm init <path> (tracker-path mode) roots the tracker at the path directly, but workspace discovery for every subsequent command only probes <cwd>/.agents/pm. The very next command fails with tracker_not_initialized telling the agent to run pm init first — a hard loop: the error's next_steps re-suggest the action that caused the state. pm init . is the natural git/npm-muscle-memory spelling for 'init here', the failure is delayed (init reports ok:true), and the recovery bundle mentions neither the cwd-rooted tracker nor --pm-path. Worst case the agent re-inits and silently splits state across two trackers.

## Repro (pm 2026.7.10)
mkdir ws && cd ws && pm init . -> ok, mode tracker-path, tracker_root=<cwd>. pm list --json -> tracker_not_initialized at <cwd>/.agents/pm. pm --pm-path . list --json works.

## Fix directions (from GH-501, any-of)
1. Discovery also accepts cwd (or ancestor) as tracker root when it contains a valid settings.json + tracker layout.
2. Treat pm init . as the workspace-discovery spelling (.agents/pm under it); require an explicit --tracker-path for raw-root mode.
3. Minimum: tracker_not_initialized probes cwd for a tracker and suggests --pm-path . as an executable next step.
Option 1+3 together preserve both modes without breaking existing raw-root users; option 2 is a behavior change needing a deprecation note. Related: pm-x26a (GH-488) made path-target init emit tracker-scoped follow-up commands — same mode-split root cause, this is the discovery half.

## Philosophy tie-in
Never-block: an error whose recovery loop re-suggests its own cause is the worst agent dead-end.

## Source
https://github.com/unbraind/pm-cli/issues/501
GH-501: pm init <path> roots a tracker that workspace discovery cannot find — tracker_not_initialized loop right after init

After pm init . in an empty dir, the next pm command (e.g. pm list) works without --pm-path; discovery accepts cwd/ancestor as tracker root when it holds a valid tracker layout OR init . is redefined to the workspace-discovery spelling with an explicit flag for raw-root mode (decision recorded); tracker_not_initialized recovery bundle probes for a cwd-rooted tracker and emits an executable --pm-path next step when found; no second tracker can be silently created at .agents/pm when a cwd-rooted tracker exists; e2e test covers the init-then-list round-trip for both init modes; GH-501 closed with a comment linking the fix

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Live verification correction: current main 0f43e921 already resolves cwd-rooted tracker layouts. Fresh temp proof: pm init . --defaults --author probe created tracker-path mode at cwd; the immediately following bare pm list --json exited 0 and returned an empty item list. Root cause was already removed by the root-layout discovery work linked through pm-x26a/GH-495; no code change belongs in this PR.

patch.value: Already fixed on current main; fresh init-then-list temp proof exits 0 with implicit root-layout discovery.
